name: May-December Romance
original_name: พฤษภา ธันวา รักแท้แค่เกิดก่อน
overview: A 52-year-old teacher got dumped by her boyfriend just because she's old. She ended up doing a full-body plastic surgery that made her looked like 25-year-old girl. After that, many young men were all trying to woo her until she met Tum who is a table tennis player. Tum wants to achieve a gold medal and earn prize money to take care of his grandmother's sickness while himself got a health problem too. Age gap relationship has started from there. Inspired by a true story of SLE patients.

trailers.title: พฤษภา-ธันวา รักแท้แค่เกิดก่อน เร็ว ๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
